top_signals.title: US Stock Futures Drop as Semiconductor Stocks Slip, Yields Climb
top_signals.summary: US futures ticked lower with 10-year Treasury yields climbing above 4.6%. Major semiconductor stocks like Micron Technology Inc. and Nvidia Corp. extended declines.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Google DeepMind’s Demis Hassabis emerges as early Anthropic investor
top_signals.summary: Nobel laureate’s protégés are raising billions and spreading his influence across the AI industry

top_signals.title: Nickel Spikes as Risks to Supply Grow in Top Producer Indonesia
top_signals.summary: Nickel prices spiked following a report of further output cuts in Indonesia, and as the top producer of the metal took steps to control its commodities exports.
